High Priority Reactivation.intervention: Emergency reactivation â€” push notification + exclusive limited-time offer
High Priority Reactivation.rationale: Player has disengaged AND survival model flags imminent churn. Highest urgency.
High Priority Reactivation.objective: Prevent churn before player is permanently lost
High Priority Reactivation.measurement_kpi: Retention lift vs. holdout control group
High Priority Reactivation.phase4_connection: Measure causal treatment effect via Phase 4 Uplift Estimation (T-learner / X-learner on version split)

At-Risk Retention.intervention: Retention campaign â€” personalized reward + daily bonus streak reinstatement
At-Risk Retention.rationale: Player shows behavioral At-Risk signals; survival risk confirms intervention is needed.
At-Risk Retention.objective: Slow disengagement trajectory before player reaches Dormant
At-Risk Retention.expected_business_goal: Reduce churn rate in At-Risk cohort
At-Risk Retention.phase4_connection: A/B test gate_30 vs gate_40 on retention lift â€” estimated in Phase 4

Onboarding Nurture.intervention: Onboarding nudge â€” tutorial completion bonus + first-week milestone reward
Onboarding Nurture.rationale: New players in acquisition funnel. Investment here maximizes long-run retention.
Onboarding Nurture.objective: Convert new players to habitual sessions within first 7 days
Onboarding Nurture.measurement_kpi: D7 retention rate for treated vs. untreated new players
Onboarding Nurture.phase4_connection: Gate placement (version) may moderate onboarding friction â€” Phase 4 quantifies this

Loyalty Reward.intervention: Loyalty program â€” VIP recognition + exclusive content unlock
Loyalty Reward.rationale: Healthy, stable player. Reward loyalty to sustain engagement, avoid over-intervention.
Loyalty Reward.objective: Sustain and reward existing healthy engagement â€” avoid intervention fatigue
Loyalty Reward.expected_business_goal: Maintain retention in highest-value stable cohort
Loyalty Reward.phase4_connection: Phase 4 validates whether VIP treatment causally lifts long-run retention

Monitor and Observe.intervention: Passive monitoring â€” standard communications only, no active intervention
Monitor and Observe.rationale: Catch-all for players not meeting higher-priority criteria. Observe and re-evaluate.
Monitor and Observe.objective: Conserve LiveOps budget â€” do not intervene without sufficient signal
Monitor and Observe.secondary_kpi: Priority score change over time (score drift monitoring)
Monitor and Observe.measurement_kpi: Natural churn rate â€” serves as control group reference
Monitor and Observe.phase4_connection: This group forms the natural control baseline for Phase 4 causal estimation
